summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ORBITRADE binary options trading platform. Tested all new features including manual crypto deposits, affiliate system, Touch/No Touch trading, password reset flow, and admin commission structure management.

minor_issues.impact: Manual crypto deposit API was returning 500 error

session_issues.issue: Session expires quickly during testing, redirects to login
session_issues.impact: Minor - affects testing flow but not user experience

passed_tests: Master user login with masteruser@orbitrade.live / password
Dashboard loads with Trade Type selector (High/Low, Touch, No Touch)
Manual crypto deposit API (/api/deposits POST) accepts deposits
Affiliate stats API (/api/affiliate/stats) returns referral code and earnings
Password reset flow generates and accepts reset codes
Admin commission structure can be viewed and saved
Real-time price data for forex, crypto, and metals
Backend API endpoints working (90.5% success rate)
Deposit page shows crypto wallet address, amount input, tx hash input, screenshot upload
